steps.title: Use the frequency contrast
steps.content: The final sentence says Underground Railroad supporters were "by and large" vocal abolitionists. That phrase means generally or for the most part, so the blank should allow a limited exception before the general pattern.

steps.title: Choose the limited exception
steps.content: B would make secrecy an example of Goodrich's outspokenness. C suggests an unsupported result. D creates a broad contrast, but the next sentence narrows the point to what happened generally. The needed transition means sometimes. The answer is A.
